name: Barbecued Pork Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 2 Boneless pork loin roasts, each weighing 2-1/2 to 3 lbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the roasts in an 8-quart Dutch oven.
2. Add water and salt.
3. Cover and cook on medium-low heat for 2-1/2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
4. Remove the roasts and shred them with a fork. Set aside.
5. Skim fat from the cooking liquid and discard it.
6. Drain all but 1 cup of the cooking liquid.
7. Add the shredded meat, ketchup, celery, steak sauce, brown sugar, vinegar, and lemon juice to the pot.
8. Cover and cook over medium-low heat for 1-1/2 hours.
9. Serve on buns.
